student.title: student
student.description: Represents a registered student participant tracking their Codeforces handles.

name.description: The full name of the student

handle.description: The unique Codeforces handle of the student

addedAt.description: Timestamp when this record was registered

lastCfUpdate.description: Optional timestamp of the last successful Codeforces API status sync

/students/{studentId}.description: Durable registry database collection for student competitors indexed by their lowercased handle.
